pageDescription: Manages global prompt, scene recognition rules, rewrite rules, and general rewrite guidance. Model parameters are configured in the provider settings.
ai.sectionDescription: Enter natural language, preview the parsed changes, then confirm to write to the config snapshot.
ai.inputPlaceholder: e.g. Make the global prompt more restrained and realistic; add scene rule: combat, trigger conditions: slaughter, clash
ai.helpText: Only global prompt, scene recognition rules, rewrite rules, and general rewrite guidance are supported. Adjust model parameters on the provider page.
ai.chip.simplifyPrompt: Make the global prompt more concise
ai.chip.addSceneRule: Add scene rule: combat, trigger conditions: slaughter, clash
ai.chip.setGeneralGuidance: Set general guidance to: maintain factual consistency, no new worldbuilding
ai.chip.addRewriteRule: Add rewrite rule: combat, strategies=expand,rewrite, target_ratio=2.2
ai.preview.title: Preview
globalPrompt.sectionDescription: A global system prompt shared by Analyze and Rewrite.
sceneRules.sectionDescription: Manually add scene types and trigger conditions. No built-in rules by default.
sceneRules.empty: No scene rules yet. Add one to get started.
rewriteRules.sectionDescription: Paired with scene rules by scene_type. Each scene can have only one rewrite rule; multiple strategies can be selected, defaulting to expand.
rewriteRules.empty: No rewrite rules yet. Add one to get started.
rewriteRules.allBound: All scenes already have rewrite rules.
rewriteRules.generalGuidance.title: General Rewrite Guidance
rewriteRules.generalGuidance.placeholder: e.g. Maintain a steady pace, avoid colloquialisms, preserve character relationships and key facts.
rewriteRules.field.sceneGuidancePlacehol: e.g. Add action details and psychological tension for combat scenes, without introducing new character settings.
json.sectionDescription: All three config modes share the same snapshot. Preview before importing, then confirm to write.
json.placeholder: View or edit JSON config here...
json.preview.title: Import Preview
json.preview.description: Changes will only be applied after confirmation
